headline: Southwest says plus-size flyers no longer need to buy a second seat — but getting one free isn't guaranteed
summary: Airlines’ customer-of-size policies could face challenges as airlines trim their schedules and reduce flights to cope with the rising costs of jet fuel amid the war in Iran.

raw.headline: Southwest says plus-size flyers no longer need to buy a second seat — but getting one free isn't guaranteed

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $60
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ravi Shanker   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $55 to $60.
